creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 210292
sysget-2.3.diff

sysget is a bridge that lets you use one syntax
to every package manager on every unix-based
operating system.

WWW: https://github.com/emilengler/sysget

QA:
 * portlint: looks fine;
 * poudriere: package built, application works as intended.
